title: BachMusicInputConfig
description: Configuration schema for input.json used to control music generation parameters.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file.

instruments.description: List of instruments to be used in the generated music. Keyboard instruments (e.g. piano, organ, harpsichord) allocate 2 staves (left and right hands); other instruments allocate 1 stave.

tempo.description: Tempo of the generated piece in Beats Per Minute (BPM). Values under 80 map to slow tempo; values over 125 map to fast tempo; other values map to medium tempo.

key.description: The musical key of the piece (e.g., 'C Maj', 'D min', 'A min', 'Cm'). Keys ending in 'min' or 'm' (case-insensitive) will configure the generator to use minor mode, otherwise major mode is used.

mood.description: The expressive mood/tempo designation of the piece.

genre.description: The musical genre of the composition.

baroque_tag.description: Specific baroque form tag. Used to condition the model on a specific style.

form.description: Overall structure of the piece. 'ABA' generates a three-section ternary form with variations in Section A'. 'single' generates a standard single-section piece.

time_signature.description: Time signature fraction string (e.g., '4/4', '3/4', '6/8'). Used to align bar boundaries.
